# ROADMAP.md v13.2 replacement: fold the weighting-round consensus into the next-release scope

## Context

The post-v13.1 `/update-roadmap` beat ran as a team-weighted round on D#14561 (operator directive: massive collaboration, priority weighting). Six entries converged (fold: [DC…17528678](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/discussions/14561#discussioncomment-17528678)); `ROADMAP.md` still reads "Next: v13.1" — one release stale. Per the update-roadmap skill: replace, don't append.

## The Problem

The roadmap is the session-intake surface for contributors and agents; a stale one routes work at a shipped release. The fold's converged shape (thesis + 5 cornerstones + explicit deferred set) exists only as a discussion comment — it needs the durable, replace-in-place artifact plus milestone-#9 anchoring.

## The Architectural Reality

- `ROADMAP.md` (repo root) — replace the v13.1 section wholesale; prior-release history relocates to release notes (already exists); vision stays in `.github/VISION.md` (untouched — hold H stands).
- Milestone #9 (v13.2) exists, empty; cornerstone epics link to it (the roadmap names cornerstones + thesis, the milestone holds the item graph).
- The fold comment is the consensus record; the PR cites it (six entries, disclosures carried).

## The Fix

One PR: rewrite `ROADMAP.md`'s next-release section per the fold — thesis (stranger-legible, demo-to-metric accountable), 5 cornerstones (A cockpit arc · B docking+demos · C GP-floor · D self-config/TTFP · E-as-guardrail + #12456 pull-in) with anchors + done-signals, Grace's sequencing honored (coherence floor early, PoC+demos late), explicit deferred set (v13.3 traction-completion · F-beyond-ADR · H · I-until-retriaged · G · #12679-through-C · v14 horizon), steward map = the epics' live assignees, cadence guard (100–150 merged PRs ceiling).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` next-release section replaced (no v13.1 residue inline; no appended history layer).
- [ ] Thesis + 5 cornerstones + explicit deferred set match the fold comment; every cornerstone cites its epic anchors + a done-signal.
- [ ] Cornerstone epics assigned to milestone #9 (post-merge validation item).
- [ ] The fold comment cited as the consensus record; the round's disclosures note carried.
- [ ] Cross-family review before merge.

## Out of Scope

VISION.md (hold H) · milestone item-graph curation beyond cornerstone-epic links · #14304 re-triage (C's cleanup owns it).

## Related

D#14561 (round + fold) · milestone #9 · #14560/#13158/#14472/#14565/#14581/#14564/#14442/#12456 (cornerstone anchors) · the update-roadmap skill (replace-don't-append; celebrate-then-plan — celebration on record in the round).

Live latest-open sweep: latest 8 checked 2026-07-04T02:13Z + fold-comment window; no equivalent. A2A sweep: fold stewardship passed to me by Grace (02:17Z message, relayed on-thread); no competing fold claim. Structure-map gate: N/A — root doc replacement.
